ops.body: SHIPPED in 31189524d31b (v0.10.5, released + deployed this Mac). Root cause: Chrome storage partitioning serializes compound StorageKeys (origin/^0top-level-site, ^1-^6 nonce/ancestor/opaque) into Local+Session Storage LevelDB keys; parseLocalStorageKey/parseNamespaceOrigin returned the whole blob as an origin. Fix: isPartitionedKey rejects any ^ in the origin component (Chromium precludes ^ inside serialized origins) -> partitioned entries skipped entirely (user-confirmed choice; they're invisible to first-party pages and inexpressible in Playwright storageState). Verified: table tests over all ^0-^6 forms + caret-in-script-key control; live harness found 5,299 raw partitioned keys on disk incl. the exact repro key https://github.com/^0https://lemire.me, zero surfaced; post-deploy CLI repro: origins = bare https://github.com only, carets=0, entries 1484->1483. CI + Release green. NOTE: yasyf-home still on old binary (glued origins possible in daemon union until upgraded to v0.10.5). Follow-up filed: a5c6ce4 (pre-existing parseNamespaceOrigin multi-token-scheme truncation, found by review refuter).
